name: Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease bottoms of muffin pan cups.
3. Sift flour with sugar, baking powder, and salt together.
4. Measure the milk into a 2-cup measure.
5. Add oil and egg, then beat everything together with a fork until well mixed.
6. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
7. Pour the milk mixture into the well all at once.
8. Stir quickly with a spatula just until the dry ingredients are moistened. Do not overmix; the batter will be lumpy.
9. Fold in the blueberries.
10. Fill each muffin cup more than half full, and lightly sprinkle with sugar.
11. Bake for 20-25 minutes (a tester inserted into the center should come out clean when done).
